html:
Gevin Harlaw
Gevin by Patrick McEvoy © Fantasy Flight Games
Allegiance House Harlaw
Culture ironborn
Died 299 AC (possibly)
Winterfell
Books
  • A Clash of Kings (appears)
  • A Storm of Swords (appendix)

Gevin Harlaw is a member of House Harlaw and an ironborn raider.[1] His relation to Lord Rodrik Harlaw, the head of the house, is currently unknown.

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Clash of Kings
    • 1.2 A Storm of Swords
  • 2 Quotes
  • 3 Family
  • 4 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Clash of Kings[ ]

Gevin is among the ironborn who participate in the harrying of the Stony Shore. He kneels on the chest of a dead northman and saws a finger off to get a ring. [2]

Four Harlaws remain with Theon Greyjoy after the capture of Winterfell and are slain during the sack of Winterfell by House Bolton;[1] it is unknown if Dykk and Gevin are among them or if they are among the ironborn who abandon Theon beforehand.

A Storm of Swords[ ]

Gevin is listed among the crew of Sea Bitch.[3]

Quotes[ ]

Paying the iron price. My lord father would approve.[2]

—thoughts of Theon Greyjoy
